notes: Auditor findings accumulated one domain at a time (waves of <=3), audited independently against the rulebook without seeing the answer key. Domains completed so far: STO.

findings.evidence: parse_amount(input: str) -> float: return float(input), money parsed into a binary float
findings.fix: parse straight into Decimal(input), never float

findings.evidence: to_minor_units(amount: float) -> int: round(amount * 100), money held and computed as float
findings.fix: accept Decimal or int cents, do exact arithmetic

findings.evidence: from_minor_units(minor: int) -> float: minor / 100, returns a float money value
findings.fix: return Decimal, e.g. Decimal(minor) / 100

findings.evidence: round_money(value: float) -> float: round(value, 2), money typed and rounded as float
findings.fix: operate on Decimal with quantize and an explicit rounding mode

findings.evidence: to_decimal(amount: float) -> Decimal: return Decimal(amount), Decimal built directly from a float, freezing the float error
findings.fix: Decimal(str(amount)), or never take a float and parse to Decimal at the boundary

findings.evidence: float(input) parses the amount to float first, precision lost at the float() call before any Decimal wraps it
findings.fix: parse external input directly into Decimal(input)

findings.evidence: round(amount * 100) hardcodes 100 as the minor-unit multiplier for every currency (breaks JPY exp 0, BHD exp 3)
findings.fix: scale by 10**exponent from an ISO 4217 currency table, not a literal 100

findings.evidence: minor / 100 hardcodes a 2-decimal divisor for all currencies
findings.fix: divide by 10**exponent looked up per currency

findings.evidence: round(value, 2) assumes exactly 2 fractional digits for every currency
findings.fix: round to the currency ISO 4217 minor-unit exponent, not a literal 2

findings.evidence: subtotal DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) or integer minor units

findings.evidence: tax DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: total DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, money stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: unit_price REAL NOT NULL, unit price stored as binary float
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) with guard digits for sub-cent prices

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (payments), payment amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4) or BIGINT minor units

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (webhook_events), credited amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: amount DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL (ledger_entries), ledger entry amount as double
findings.fix: use NUMERIC(19,4), a ledger must be exact

findings.evidence: balance NUMERIC(6,2), a running account balance accumulator caps at 9999.99 and overflows
findings.fix: size precision for the largest total, e.g. NUMERIC(19,4)

findings.evidence: accounts.balance has no adjacent currency column, every balance is a bare number with no unit
findings.fix: add currency_code CHAR(3) (ISO 4217) per row

findings.evidence: invoices subtotal, tax, total have no currency column alongside the amounts
findings.fix: add a currency_code column to invoices

findings.evidence: payments.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to payments

findings.evidence: webhook_events.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to webhook_events

findings.evidence: ledger_entries.amount has no currency column
findings.fix: add currency_code to ledger_entries
